sentences.arabic: أَعَدَّتِ الْأُمُّ الْحَقَائِبَ قَبْلَ يَوْمٍ مِنَ السَّفَرِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je pripremila torbe dan prije putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: The mother prepared the bags one day before the trip.

sentences.translation: Stavila je u torbu odjeću i lijekove.
sentences.translationEn: She put clothes and medicine in the bag.

sentences.arabic: نَسِيَتِ الْحَقِيبَةَ الصَّغِيرَةَ وَتَذَكَّرَتْهَا فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Zaboravila je malu torbu i sjetila se je ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: She forgot the small bag and remembered it in the morning.

sentences.arabic: أَضَافَتْهَا وَسَافَرَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُنَاسِبِ.
sentences.translation: Dodala ju je i porodica je putovala u pravo vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: She added it and the family traveled on time.
